== Notes for [[Item:Q101458|Q101458]] ==

https://www.academia.edu/2774302/Una_familia_de_la_oligarqu%C3%ADa_burgalesa_en_el_siglo_XV_los_Alonso_de_BurgosMaluenda._La_ciudad_de_Burgos._Actas_del_Congreso_de_Ha_de_Burgos._Le%C3%B3n_Junta_de_Castilla_y_Le%C3%B3n_1985._pp._143-162._ISBN_84-505-1272-7 (page 149)

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9A0F5C1EFBBFA9822EF79916C78C1
geni:6000000081294103445

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
